M: w w w w w w w w w w w
w w w w w l0w w w w w
w w w w w w w w w w w

mвҚі.task: {mвҚі} is the _emerald rune of counting_, conjuring every whole number from 1 up to the number on its right. `n` mossy steppingstones cross the grove brook вҖ” name them in order, first to last.

dГ—.task: {dГ—} is the _ruby rune of multiplication_, scaling each number on its right by the number on its left. Four runestones hold the powers `p`; a charm of strength `s` magnifies each. What powers result?

mвҲӘ.task: {mвҲӘ} is the _emerald rune of distinction_, keeping only the first appearance of each item on its right. The old chant `w` echoes with repeated runes вҖ” distil it to its distinct runes.

d+.task: {d+} is the _ruby rune of addition_, adding what lies on its left to what lies on its right. A wayfarer carries `a` coins and finds a cache of `b` more. How many coins in all?

d,.task: {d,} is the _ruby rune of joining_, weaving what lies on its left onto what lies on its right into a single strand. Bind the two sigils `x` and `y` into one continuous sigil.

DвҲҳ.task: {DвҲҳ} is the _amethyst rune of tabulation_ вҖ” set to the left of another rune, it lays out a table, applying that rune between every value on one side and every value on the other. Using {d+}, raise an addition table from the numbers `v`, each summed with each.

M/.task: {M/} is the _sapphire rune of insertion_ вҖ” set to the right of a rune, it slips that rune between all the items on its right. The _factorial_ of `n` is every whole number from 1 to `n` multiplied together вҖ” weave {dГ—} through {mвҚі}. Find the factorial of `n`.

l0.task: A mossy gate bars the way deeper into the grove. Its worn inscription asks for _the sum of the first `n` whole numbers_. Speak the total to pass.

j{.task:
{j{} is the _diamond of binding_ вҖ” a pair of braces `{ }` that captures an expression into a rune of your own making, with `вҚө` standing for whatever is set on its right. Forge a rune that returns the factorial of its argument.

`{answer} 4` gives `24`, and `{answer} 6` gives `720`.

dвүЎ.task:
{dвүЎ} is the _ruby rune of matching_, giving 1 when what lies on its left is exactly the same as what lies on its right, and 0 otherwise. Calling on {j{} and {mвҲӘ}, forge a rune that tells whether a list is all distinct вҖ” 1 if every item differs, 0 if any repeats.

`{answer} 1 2 3 2 1` gives 0; `{answer} 1 16 12` gives 1.

l1.task:
An ancient warden seals the eastern arch. It speaks a final riddle: for a hoard `вҚө`, forge a rune that tallies how many times each _distinct_ treasure appears within it. Answer truly, and the way onward opens.

`{answer} 'MISSISSIPPI'` gives `1 4 4 2` вҖ” one M, four I, four S, two P.

j(.task:
{j(} is the _diamond of precedence_ вҖ” a pair of parentheses `( )` binding an expression together so a rune takes it whole. An _identity matrix_ of size `вҚө` is a square table of 0s bearing 1s on its diagonal. Drawing on {mвҚі}, {DвҲҳ} and {dвүЎ}, forge a rune that raises an identity matrix of the given size.

`{answer} 3` gives a 3Г—3 identity table.
